candidate_definition_hints.text: Basic sample for deploying AI agents web app with Azure AI Foundry and SDKs

The agent leverages Foundry Agent Service and utilizes file search for knowledge retrieval from uploaded files, enabling it to generate responses with citations. The solution also includes built-in monitoring capabilities with tracing to ensure easier troubleshooting and optimiz…
